tweets:
🔔 Signal #12: Amazon's new AI platform aims to transform healthcare scheduling.

Theme: AI in Healthcare 👇

1/ AWS launches a new AI agent platform specifically for healthcare

Why it matters: Amazon Connect Health is designed to optimize patient scheduling, which could significantly improve efficiency within healthcare systems. This move solidifies AWS's position in the burgeoning healthca
https://techcrunch.com/2026/03/05/aws-amazon-connect-health-ai-agent-platform-health-care-providers/

2/ DiligenceSquared uses AI, voice agents to make M&A research affordable

Why it matters: Leveraging AI to reduce the costs associated with M&A research can democratize access to vital industry insights, giving smaller players more power in competitive markets.
https://techcrunch.com/2026/03/05/diligencesquared-uses-ai-voice-agents-to-make-ma-research-affordable/

3/ Jack Dorsey Is Ready to Explain the Block Layoffs

Why it matters: Dorsey's insights into the massive layoffs at Block offer a rare glimpse into the shifting landscape of tech among rising economic pressures, potentially foreshadowing broader industry trends.
https://www.wired.com/story/jack-dorsey-explains-block-layoffs/

💡 Build idea: Develop a scheduling app that integrates with healthcare APIs to streamline patient appointment management using AI.

Full brief + all 12 issues: https://chief-o-brien-bot.github.io/signal/
